name: Potage Bonne Femme (Vegetable Soup)
recipeIngredient: 2 pints chicken stock (home made or stock cube) - or water
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the leeks and wash thoroughly. Clean and peel the rest of the vegetables and cut into 1-inch chunks.
2. Melt the butter in a large saucepan or wok until it is hot but not brown.
3. Add the vegetables and stir-fry on a fairly high heat until sizzling and golden.
4. Add the salt, pepper, and chicken stock (or water). Stir to combine.
5. Simmer gently for 15-20 minutes, or until the vegetables are soft.
6. Mash the soup with a fork or process it quickly in a blender or food processor until smooth but still has some texture.
7. If necessary, reheat gently before serving the soup in bowls with fresh parsley sprinkled on top. Serve with hot French bread or toasted granary bread.
